response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with 19+ years of experience and proven technical leadership, they are a poor fit for this C++ role. Their C++ experience is dated (2014-2015, over 10 years ago), and the last decade has focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Critically, there is no evidence of industrial automation, IoT, manufacturing, or embedded systems experience—core to the role. Key required competencies including MQTT, IEC 62443, message brokers, and industrial cybersecurity are entirely absent from their background.
strengths: 19+ years of software development experience with demonstrated seniority and technical leadership across multiple domains
Proven expertise architecting event-driven, scalable systems and microservices handling high-performance requirements
Strong mentoring capability and commitment to software craftsmanship, evidenced by workshops, talks, and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: C++ expertise is 10+ years outdated; recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with no active C++ development
Complete absence of industrial automation, manufacturing, embedded systems, or IoT experience—the domain this role operates in
Missing critical technical requirements: MQTT, IEC 62443 standards, message brokers, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), and secure embedded development

key_factors.factor: Strong software engineering fundamentals and seniority
